text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Once I've finished helping the teacher, I believe
that one classmate wanted to talk to me... After
that, I need to prep for my lessons.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm cutting it close schedule-wise, but it should be
fine!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it feels nice to have so many people
depending on me.
